benefits.description: opposite of anxiety, reduction in on-edge feeling related to work; used for anxiety/depression management

side_effects.description: effects wear off about 1-2 hours before end of work shift each day due to short half-life; opted for N-acetyl-selank for longer half-life

protocol_notes: Running N-acetyl-selank for about a week due to job-related anxiety. Recommends N-acetyl-selank over regular selank for its longer half-life. Expects effects to improve over time with continued use.
